description_long: This is a vintage, single-propeller biplane with a light tan fuselage and blue-tinted wings and tail surfaces, each adorned with bold black Iron Cross insignias. The wings are straight and mounted at a mid-level position on the fuselage, with visible struts and wire bracing for structural support. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the propeller, with a small windshield and a single seat visible. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a tail skid, all fixed and non-retractable, with thin support struts. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both marked with insignias. The overall appearance suggests a World War I-era German fighter aircraft, likely constructed primarily from wood and fabric with some metal components.
description: A vintage, tan and blue single-propeller biplane with black Iron Cross insignias, open cockpit, and fixed landing gear. The design is reminiscent of a World War I-era German fighter aircraft.
description_view_0: The left-front view highlights the propeller, open cockpit, and the Iron Cross insignias on the wings and tail, with the landing gear and struts clearly visible.
description_view_1: The rear view shows the tail section, including the single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, as well as the full wingspan and rear landing gear struts.
description_view_2: The right-rear view emphasizes the tail assembly, the right wing's insignia, and the structure of the landing gear and support struts.
description_view_3: The front view centers on the propeller, open cockpit, and the symmetrical placement of the Iron Cross insignias on both wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no sweep or dihedral, no winglets, supported by struts and wires.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit with a small windshield.
